scene: A modern city crowd of stick figures with a few faintly glowing among them, big black caps ALIVE RIGHT NOW. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

One glowing figure beside a small Einstein silhouette with an equals sign, big black caps JUST AS BRILLIANT. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Glowing figures working at desks and labs with little spark bursts, big black caps MAKING BREAKTHROUGHS. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The glowing figures all with blank name tags, big black caps YOU'LL NEVER KNOW THEIR NAMES. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark over a hidden crowd, big black caps THE REASON IS WILD. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
